item.title: E-Commerce Mobile App
item.description:
A fully-featured e-commerce application built with Flutter and Firebase.

Features

  • Product catalog with search and filters
  • Secure user authentication
  • Shopping cart and checkout
  • Real-time order tracking
  • Payment integration with Stripe

Tech Stack

  • Frontend: Flutter
  • Backend: Firebase
  • Database: Firestore
  • Payments: Stripe API

Impact

The app handles 10,000+ active users with a 4.8-star rating on app stores.

item.title: Task Management System
item.description:
A collaborative task management web application for teams.

Features

  • Real-time collaboration
  • Task assignment and tracking
  • Team workspaces
  • Activity timeline
  • Multiple view options (list, board, timeline)

Tech Stack

  • Frontend: React with TypeScript
  • Backend: Node.js + Express
  • Database: PostgreSQL
  • Real-time: WebSockets

Results

Used by 500+ teams managing 100,000+ tasks monthly.

item.title: Analytics Dashboard
item.description:
A comprehensive analytics dashboard for SaaS applications.

Features

  • Real-time data visualization
  • Custom report generation
  • Advanced filtering and segmentation
  • Multi-user access control
  • Data export capabilities

Tech Stack

  • Frontend: React + D3.js
  • Backend: Go (Gin framework)
  • Database: ClickHouse for time-series data
  • Caching: Redis

Performance

Handles millions of events with sub-second query responses.
